title: Chef Jon Kung’s Kitchen Secrets: A Fridge Covered in Stickers and a Dream Rice Cooker
summary: What’s the one kitchen gadget a famous chef regrets buying? For Jon Kung, it’s a used SMEG fridge with a giant British flag on it. “I’ve stuck Sex Pistols, Ozzy Osbourne, and Spice Girls stickers on the sides to try to make it a little better,” they say with a laugh. Kung is a TikTok star with over 2 million followers who makes amazing Chinese food with flavors from all over the world. When WIRED asked what they wish existed, Kung didn’t pause: “A rice cooker that also washes your rice.” Why? Because washing rice is super important—and not just to make it fluffy. “I don’t think people know there are bug eggs in rice,” Kung says. “They’re called rice weevils, and unless you’re buying that super expensive prewashed rice, there are lots of bugs in rice.” Yikes! Until that dream machine is invented, Kung recommends Zojirushi rice cookers, especially the ones with pressure settings that keep rice fresh for days. Kung also shared other tips: skip combo nonstick-and-stainless pans (they’re bad at both jobs) and instead get one ceramic nonstick pan for eggs and one stainless steel pan for searing. Their priciest item? An AGA induction range that they bought with their first big TikTok paycheck. And for knives, they say: buy two affordable ones instead of one fancy one, so you can always send one out for sharpening. “You can have the fanciest knife in the world, but if you don’t get it sharpened, there’s no point—ha!”
why_it_matters: Knowing a few smart kitchen tips can make cooking at home easier, cheaper, and more fun, even for a beginner.

keywords.explanation: A fancy brand that makes kitchen appliances like refrigerators.
A type of stove that uses magnets to heat pots directly, very fast.
Cooking the outside of food at high heat to make it brown and tasty.
A pan coating that stops food from sticking, making eggs easy to flip.
A shiny metal that doesn't rust, great for pans that get hot.
Tiny bugs that can live in uncooked rice, which washing removes.

options: Stickers of bands like the Sex Pistols
questions.correct_answer: Stickers of bands like the Sex Pistols

questions.question: What is one thing Kung says combo nonstick-and-stainless pans are bad at?

background_read: TikTok has made many home cooks into stars by letting them share short, fun cooking videos with millions of people.
Jon Kung is known on TikTok for creating Chinese food with flavors from different cultures, mixing traditions in exciting ways.

Zojirushi is a well-known Japanese company that makes some of the best rice cookers in the world, prized for their precision, and SMEG is an Italian company famous for its colorful, retro-looking kitchen appliances.
Article_Structure: WHO: Jon Kung, a TikTok-famous chef with over 2 million followers.
WHAT: They revealed their biggest kitchen gadget mistake (a SMEG fridge) and gave tips on rice cookers, pans, and knives.
WHY: Kung wants people to know that washing rice removes bug eggs, and that you don't need expensive single-purpose tools.

perspectives.description: They laugh at their own fridge mistake and share practical advice, showing that even pros learn from funny buying regrets.
Discovering you don't need fancy knives or pricey gadgets to cook well can make starting in the kitchen less scary.
Some chefs warn that nonstick pans wear out quickly, so it's wise to treat them gently and replace them when scratched.
